title: Phase 21.6 — Restricted Effectiveness Mode Rules
reason: With 7 indexing requests pending and effectiveness measurement beginning, daily loop must operate in RESTRICTED_EFFECTIVENESS mode. This prevents actions that interfere with measurement or violate indexing request policy.
duration: Until Phase 21.6 monitoring completes OR Qasem lifts restriction

improve_real_calculators.constraint: Must target real value for users, not keyword-stuffing

add_internal_links_to_real_pages.target_pages: Real calculators, real guides, real decisions, real blogs
add_internal_links_to_real_pages.constraint: Do NOT link to thin tools/scenarios as primary destinations

allowed: Check GSC for new clicked pages daily
monitor_first_click_candidates.constraint: Focus on real pages, not thin variants

prepare_outreach_v2_followups.constraint: Do NOT send before Jun 13. Do NOT ask for backlinks in first contact.

audit_thin_tools_scenarios.constraint: Audit only — no optimization, no SEO changes

allowed: Add internal links from thin variants to parent

blocked_actions.thin_tool_seo_as_standalone: Prohibited. No CTR/title/meta improvements for /tools/ or /scenario/ variant pages.
blocked_actions.title_only_changes_without_measurement_r: Prohibited. Title changes must have a measurement hypothesis and expected effect.
blocked_actions.unapproved_cleanup: Prohibited. No noindex, canonical, redirect, delete, or sitemap removal without Auditor + Technical Guardian approval.
blocked_actions.indexing_api: Prohibited. Never use Google Indexing API.
blocked_actions.cached_gsc_data: Prohibited. Only fresh API pulls with 3-window verification.

daily_execution_gates.gate_1_gsc_freshness: 3-window GSC pull must show variation. If identical across 3 windows: BLOCKED.
daily_execution_gates.gate_2_real_page_focus: All SEO changes must target real pages (calculators, guides, decisions, blogs). If only thin tool changes: BLOCKED.
daily_execution_gates.gate_3_thin_tool_freeze: No thin tool/scenario SEO changes. If detected: BLOCKED and ROLLBACK.
daily_execution_gates.gate_4_cooldown_check: Pages changed within last 14 days not eligible for re-edit unless emergency.
daily_execution_gates.gate_5_indexing_request_rules: No repeat indexing requests within 7 days.

constraints: Only deploy if at least 1 gate 1-4 action completed
Scenario sitemap must NOT be submitted
